description: Tea Culture Museum, showcasing the history and culture of Chinese tea, located in the original production area of Longjing tea.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, the legendary meeting place of Bai Suzhen and Xu Xian, marking the starting point of the northern line of West Lake.

attraction_name: Southern Song Imperial Street Zhongshan Road Pedestrian Street
description: A modern pedestrian street built on the ruins of the Southern Song Dynasty imperial city, blending historical culture with modern commerce.
The largest island in West Lake, concentrated with historical and cultural attractions, offering a tranquil environment.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, located on Xiaoyingzhou Island, named after the reflection of three stone pagodas resembling the moon.

A reconstructed ancient pagoda with a history of over a thousand years; visitors can climb the pagoda for a panoramic view of West Lake. It is closely associated with the legend of 'The Legend of the White Snake.'
One of the New Ten Scenes of West Lake, featuring nine converging streams, particularly enchanting during autumn.

attraction_name: Autumn Moon over the Calm Lake Scenic Spot
description: One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a popular spot for moon-viewing and lake-gazing, characterized by its serene and picturesque scenery.

attraction_name: China Academy of Art Xiangshan Campus
description: A renowned art academy with unique architectural design, ideal for art enthusiasts to visit.
A well-preserved historical district with typical Jiangnan water town architecture and a vibrant local atmosphere.
Hangzhou's most representative historical and cultural district, retaining Ming and Qing architectural styles and hosting numerous specialty shops.
A famous ancient Buddhist temple in China with a history of approximately 1,700 years, known for its thriving incense offerings and magnificent architecture.

attraction_name: Hangzhou Hubin Intime in77 Zone A
description: A well-known shopping center in Hangzhou, located by West Lake, offering a wide range of brands and convenient transportation.
The original production area of Longjing tea, one of China's top ten famous teas, where visitors can experience tea culture and taste authentic Longjing tea.
The foremost of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a lakeside causeway constructed under the supervision of Su Dongpo, renowned for its willow trees in spring.
The most important comprehensive museum in Zhejiang Province, featuring a rich collection of historical artifacts and art treasures, located on the scenic Solitary Hill.
A famous Chinese seal carving society with a century-long history and cultural significance.
One of the Ten Scenes of West Lake, a garden renowned for its koi fish viewing, especially beautiful during the blooming season in spring.
